text: Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: The higher (A) / you (B) / go, (C) / cooler it is (D).
Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: He (A) / was (B) / appointed (C) / the principal of the school (D).
Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: He (A) / can (B) / play (C) / piano very well (D).
Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: I (A) / like (B) / (C) / the blue color (D).
Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: Wisdom (A) / of (B) / Solomon is famous (C).
Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: This (A) / is (B) / a (C) / worst mistake I have ever made (D).
options: worst mistake I have ever made

text: Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: He (A) / was (B) / in (C) / the prison for two years (D). (Context: He was a prisoner)
Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: Gold (A) / of (B) / South Africa is exported to many countries (C).
Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: He (A) / is (B) / a (C) / LCD employee (D).
Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: Lion (A) / is (B) / the king of beasts (C). (Context: Referring to the species)
Identify the part of the sentence that contains a grammatical error: He (A) / has (B) / a little (C) / money, he cannot buy bread (D). (Context: Meaning virtually none)
Identify the correct usage of articles in the following sentence: '_______ silver is a precious metal, but _______ silver used in this antique trophy is exceptionally pure.'
Choose the most appropriate determinant: '_______ of the two candidates was able to solve the complex algorithmic challenge during the technical round.'
The project was delayed because there was _______ cooperation between the development and testing teams.
Identify the correct sentence regarding the use of 'the' with geographical features.
options: The Mount Everest is the highest peak in the world.
Mount Everest is the highest peak in the world.
A Mount Everest is highest peak in the world.
The Mount Everest is highest peak in the world.

text: We have _______ time left before the server maintenance begins, so let's finalize the documentation.
Select the correct option: '_______ books I had were all destroyed in the fire.'
_______ you say will be kept confidential by the HR department.
He is _______ better programmer than his brother, though both are quite skilled.
_______ milk in this packet is insufficient for the entire team's coffee.
Identify the correct determinant: '_______ member of the committee was given a copy of the new policy.'
It was _______ unique opportunity for the interns to interact with the CTO.
Choose the correct sentence: '_______ richness of the soil in this region is well known.'
_______ more you practice coding, _______ better you become at problem-solving.
He is _______ most industrious student I have ever mentored.
Select the correct option: 'I have _______ friends in this city, so I often feel lonely.'
_______ of the information provided in the brochure was outdated.
Identify the correct article usage: 'He is _______ honor to his country and _______ example to all youth.'
_______ students who attended the workshop were given certificates.
Choose the correct determinant: 'The manager gave _______ instructions to the team before leaving.'
_______ man is mortal, but _______ name of a great man lives forever.
